Title: OrbitronDev
Description: A connection of multiple services. "service-account" is the main account manager for all services. "service-blog" is used to create as many blogs as you want, "service-forum" for bulletin boards, "service-store" for online shops. "service-cloud" is the unlimited storage for the user and his services in use. https://github.com/D3strukt0r/service-account https://github.com/D3strukt0r/oauth2-orbitrondev  https://github.com/D3strukt0r/service-blog https://github.com/D3strukt0r/service-forum https://github.com/D3strukt0r/service-store  https://github.com/D3strukt0r/service-cloud

Title: weleda-webcenter-text-export
Description: A little web application for Weleda AG which converts the exported XML file of WebCenter into raw text.  Used technologies were: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, TypeScript, Material UI  Code repository: https://github.com/D3strukt0r/weleda-webcenter-text-export Production environment: https://webcenter-text-export.manuele-vaccari.ch Development environment: https://webcenter-text-export-dev.manuele-vaccari.ch
